recommendations.title: Slack Bay
recommendations.overview: Summer, 1910. Inspectors Machin and Malfoy investigate the mysterious disappearances of several tourists on the beautiful beaches of Slack Bay, where a strange community of fishermen lives.

recommendations.title: France
recommendations.overview: A celebrity journalist, juggling her busy career and personal life, has her life over-turned by a freak car accident.

recommendations.title: Rashomon
recommendations.overview: Four people recount different versions of the story of a man's murder and the rape of his wife.

recommendations.title: Gone Baby Gone

recommendations.title: L.A. Confidential
recommendations.overview: Three detectives in the corrupt and brutal L.A. police force of the 1950s use differing methods to uncover a conspiracy behind the shotgun slayings of the patrons at an all-night diner.

recommendations.title: The Secret in Their Eyes

recommendations.title: Laura
recommendations.overview: A police detective falls in love with the woman whose murder he's investigating.

recommendations.title: Wind River
recommendations.overview: An FBI agent teams with the town's veteran game tracker to investigate a murder that occurred on a Native American reservation.
